# FLOW SEO
> Evidence-led SEO knowledge base for humans and AI agents using Find -> Leverage -> Optimize -> Win. Covers AI search, local SEO, content strategy, off-site corroboration, conversion pages, measurement, and 42 standardized prompts. Built for 2026 search reality with cited sources and retrieval dates.

FLOW is a connected operating model for SEO across classic organic results, AI Overviews and LLM citations, local search and Google Business Profile, off-site corroboration, and conversion measurement. Every claim cites a 2026-current source with a retrieval date. Every prompt is reproducible by an AI agent reading from this repo. License: CC BY 4.0 for content + MIT for scripts.

## Prompts

- [Content planning for Topical Relevance Prompt](docs/09-prompts/find/content-planning-for-topical-relevance-prompt.md): Use this prompt when you need a structured find deliverable and want the model to separate observations, assumptions, recommended actions, and claims that ne...

- [BOFU Page Brief Generator](docs/09-prompts/win/bofu-page-brief-generator.md): Use this when you need a bottom-funnel page brief for a service, product, location, comparison, pricing, demo, or lead-capture page.
- [Conversion Audit Prompt](docs/09-prompts/win/conversion-audit-prompt.md): Use this when a page, campaign, or funnel gets traffic but produces weak leads, low conversion rate, unclear attribution, or poor sales follow-up quality.
- [Dual-Surface Content Scorecard](docs/09-prompts/win/dual-surface-content-scorecard.md): Use this when you need to judge whether a page can perform in traditional search and AI-assisted discovery while still supporting conversion.
- [AI Homepage Rewrite Prompt](docs/09-prompts/local/ai-homepage-rewrite-prompt.md): Use this prompt when you need a structured local deliverable and want the model to separate observations, assumptions, recommended actions, and claims that n...
